headline: Stephens Restarts Coverage of Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) as Operating Leverage Improves
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 15, Stephens resumed coverage of Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) with an Equal Weight rating. It also set a $19 price target on the stock. Analyst Matt Olney, who resumed coverage of nine super-regional banks, said he is “broadly […]
